analysis.reasoning: Core message: The tweet questions why Canada uniquely acted on the U.S. extradition request in the Meng Wanzhou case, implying inconsistency or unfairness in how treaties are applied by Western countries. Evaluation: CH1 (The West is immoral, hostile and decadent) – The tweet suggests selective or unequal behavior among Western-aligned countries regarding extradition, implicitly casting doubt on Western fairness/consistency. This aligns with portraying the West as acting improperly or unjustly toward China. CH2 – No portrayal of China as benevolent or cooperative; not supported. CH3 – No historical or resilience framing; not supported. CH4 – No advocacy of China’s political system or values; not supported. CH5 – No claim about CCP governance success; not supported. CH6 – Cultural content absent; not supported. Conclusion: Only CH1 is implicitly promoted.
